_comment: MolTrace control->evidence register (Security Prompt 22). Maps the in-repo security controls (built across Security Prompts 5-21) to the SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria + ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A themes, with repo-relative evidence paths. This is a self-assessment of control COVERAGE / readiness, NOT an attestation: SOC 2 and ISO 27001 are AUDITED certifications issued by an independent auditor/body. MolTrace does NOT currently hold a SOC 2 report or an ISO 27001 certificate; controls are 'designed to support' those frameworks. Validate every evidence path with compliance/validate_controls.py.

framework_status.soc2_type_ii: not held — designed to support; pursuing
framework_status.iso27001_2022: not held — controls mapped to / aligned with Annex A
framework_status.iso27017_27018: not held — cloud/PII extensions, would be certified alongside an ISO 27001 ISMS
framework_status.note: This register shows control coverage only. Only an auditor's report (SOC 2) or certificate (ISO 27001) provides assurance.

controls.control: RBAC deny-by-default policy-decision point
controls.summary: Embedded policy-as-code PDP: deny-by-default, forbid-overrides-permit, owner-scoped with non-leaking 404; new endpoints inherit the gate.

controls.control: Argon2id password hashing
controls.summary: Memory-hard KDF (64 MiB, t=3) with unique salt + optional KMS pepper; legacy PBKDF2 verify + rehash-on-login.

controls.control: Field-level envelope encryption + pluggable KMS/BYOK seam
controls.summary: Per-record AES-256-GCM data keys wrapped by a KMS KEK; key rotation + customer-managed-key seam.

controls.control: Committed-secret scanning gate + secrets-management seam
controls.summary: gitleaks over full history (CI + pre-commit); secrets resolved from a provider seam, not committed.

controls.control: TLS / transport security headers posture
controls.summary: HSTS + security response headers over TLS 1.3 (settings-gated); TLS/mTLS posture documented.

controls.control: Tamper-evident audit hash chain
controls.summary: Per-row SHA-256 chain + periodic HMAC-signed anchors + signed high-water mark; admin verify endpoint + reconciliation.

controls.control: 21 CFR Part 11 e-signature binding & manifestation
controls.summary: Server-authoritative signer, SHA-256 record-content binding (non-transferable), durable §11.50 manifestation, verify endpoint.

controls.control: ALCOA+ controlled-records primitives
controls.summary: Reason-for-change capture, reversible-by-record soft-deletes (no hard delete), server-sourced timestamps, write-once raw vault.

controls.control: GAMP 5 / CSA validation lifecycle package + change control
controls.summary: Regenerable per-release validation package (requirement->risk->test + IQ/OQ/PQ-from-CI) + validated-state change control.

controls.control: Secure-SDLC CI gates (SAST / SCA / IaC)
controls.summary: Semgrep SAST + Trivy dependency/license SCA + IaC config scanning; criticals block, findings tracked to SLAs.

controls.control: Signed supply chain (SBOM + SLSA provenance + verify-at-deploy)
controls.summary: CycloneDX SBOM per build + keyless Sigstore SLSA provenance + a verify-provenance gate the deploy needs.

controls.control: Per-tenant + per-route rate limiting and request-size guard
controls.summary: In-app token-bucket limiter (429 + Retry-After), body-size guard; edge-WAF documented as a runbook.

controls.control: Coordinated vulnerability disclosure (RFC 9116 security.txt + VDP + pen-test program)
controls.summary: Public security.txt + a VDP (safe harbor, CVSS SLAs), a pen-test program + threat model + findings register.

controls.control: Zero-trust infrastructure: CSPM-lite IaC drift gate + least-privilege CI
controls.summary: Continuously-scored IaC posture (fail-on-drift) + SHA-pinned least-privilege GitHub Actions; honest PaaS shared-responsibility map.

controls.control: Security detections engine + SIEM alert sink
controls.summary: Impossible-travel / privilege-escalation / cross-tenant / audit-chain-break detections shipped to a pluggable SIEM sink.

controls.control: Incident-response program + GDPR breach-notification deadline engine
controls.summary: IR plan + detection-keyed runbooks + a processor-aware GDPR Art. 33/34 notification-deadline engine.

controls.control: Backup / disaster-recovery restore-integrity verifier
controls.summary: Restore-integrity verifier reusing the audit chain as the oracle + documented RTO/RPO + restore-drill/game-day runbook.

controls.control: Enterprise SSO (OIDC) with server-side redirect URIs + encrypted secrets
controls.summary: Per-org OpenID Connect (Auth Code + PKCE, JWKS validation, JIT provisioning, optional enforce-SSO); IdP secrets envelope-encrypted.

controls.control: SCIM 2.0 provisioning with tenant-isolated resource ids
controls.summary: Auto-provision + soft auto-deprovision (disable + immediate session revocation), org-scoped per-connection bearer.

controls.control: MFA / passkeys / step-up authentication
controls.summary: TOTP + phishing-resistant WebAuthn/passkeys, per-tenant enforced, step-up re-auth before signing/admin.

controls.control: Session hardening: rotating single-use refresh tokens + reuse detection
controls.summary: Short-lived access bearer + rotating single-use refresh with reuse-detection family revocation + immediate DB-checked revocation.

inherited_or_operational.via: Render + Vercel (the IaaS/PaaS providers' own SOC 2 / ISO 27001 attestations under the shared-responsibility model)

inherited_or_operational.control: HR security: background screening, security-awareness training, onboarding/offboarding
inherited_or_operational.via: internal HR process (not a product control)
vendor-risk register + DPAs (sub-processor list: see docs/security/trust_center.md)

inherited_or_operational.control: Continuous-compliance monitoring tooling (Vanta / Drata) + the SOC 2 Type II / ISO 27001 audits
inherited_or_operational.via: third-party compliance platform + an independent auditor/certification body
PagerDuty/Opsgenie + Datadog/Splunk/Elastic (the in-repo detections feed these; routing is operational)
